'''Sluudren''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Sludir]]. It was located in the [[Chorlian sector/Legends|Chorlian sector]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

{{Planet-stub}}
